function.name: query_health_knowledge
function.description: Search the health knowledge base and user's personal history for relevant medical and scheme information. Use this whenever the user asks about health, symptoms, medicines, government schemes, or anything medical.

user_id.description: The caller's phone number or unique identifier

query.description: The user's question or topic to search for

language.description: Detected language: hi, en, or kn

function.name: save_conversation_summary
function.description: Save a summary of this conversation for future reference. Call this when the conversation is ending.

summary.description: 2-3 sentence summary of what was discussed and any health concerns mentioned

conditions.description: Health conditions mentioned (e.g., diabetes, pregnancy, hypertension)
